scripts.dev:host-daemon: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@bb/host-daemon --filter=@bb/cli && node scripts/run-host-daemon.mjs --mode dev
scripts.start: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@bb/app --filter=@bb/server --filter=@bb/host-daemon --filter=@bb/cli && node scripts/start-bb.mjs
scripts.start:host-daemon: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@bb/host-daemon --filter=@bb/cli && node scripts/run-host-daemon.mjs --mode prod
